name: Simplify

unions.name: Quality
unions.comment:
Simplification quality.
    Two options:
      * Low = Radial Distance + Ramer-Douglas-Peucker
      * High = only Ramer-Douglas-Peucker

values.name: simplify
values.comment: Simplify with Radial Distance and/or Ramer-Douglas-Peucker
values.type: PixelTolerance -> Quality -> Dict Int ( Float, Float ) -> Dict Int ( Float, Float )

values.name: simplifyDefault
values.comment:
Convenience function for the typical use case equal to:

    simplify OnePixel Low
values.type: Dict Int ( Float, Float ) -> Dict Int ( Float, Float )
